Off Calendar Jan-22-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Defendant Nory Michelle Hanson the moving party.
Respondent, Plaintiff Delvin Reed the opposing party.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Appellant, Defendant Nory Michelle Hanson testifies on her own behalf. The following evidence is submitted:
#1:Invoice

Respondent, Plaintiff Delvin Reed testifies on his own behalf.

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge Pro Tem Robert Stumpf, Clerk A. Datt, Not Recorded. (525)
